# ResenasYa

> ResenasYa is a SaaS platform that automates Google Maps review collection for local businesses via WhatsApp and AI sentiment analysis. When a customer replies, Claude AI classifies the sentiment and automatically directs satisfied customers to leave a Google Maps, App Store, or Play Store review.

## Product

- Landing page: https://resenasya.com
- Register: https://resenasya.com/register
- Pricing: https://resenasya.com/#precios
- FAQ: https://resenasya.com/faq
- Case studies: https://resenasya.com/casos-exito

## Blog

- How to get more Google Maps reviews: https://resenasya.com/blog/como-conseguir-mas-resenas-google-maps
- Why customers don't leave reviews via WhatsApp: https://resenasya.com/blog/por-que-clientes-no-dejan-resenas-whatsapp
- How to handle negative reviews: https://resenasya.com/blog/gestionar-resenas-negativas
- Google Maps algorithm and local SEO: https://resenasya.com/blog/algoritmo-google-maps-reputacion-local
- Is it legal to request reviews via WhatsApp (GDPR): https://resenasya.com/blog/legal-pedir-resenas-whatsapp-rgpd
- How many Google reviews does a local business need: https://resenasya.com/blog/cuantas-resenas-google-necesita-negocio-local
- WhatsApp message templates to request Google reviews: https://resenasya.com/blog/plantillas-mensajes-whatsapp-pedir-resenas-google
- Why Google reviews disappear and how to prevent it: https://resenasya.com/blog/por-que-desaparecen-resenas-google-como-evitarlo
